payload.answer: That request is too broad to store as a useful durable memory. Please narrow it to specific AI-related preferences, projects, goals, facts, or topics you want remembered.
repair_options: Store a specific AI-related preference, e.g. “I prefer concise explanations of AI concepts.”
Store a specific AI project or goal, e.g. “I’m building an AI chatbot for customer support.”
Store specific topics of interest, e.g. “I want to follow developments in AI safety and multimodal models.”
Do not store anything yet; ask me what specific AI information I want remembered.
